2158210.name: Murder Next Room
2158210.description:
Murder Next Room is a multiplayer social deduction game where you and other players are trapped in a place where a murder happened and one or more of them could be the killers. The police have been called, but they're far away and will reach the location in the morning. In the meantime, you can try to investigate who committed the murder, try to survive the night, or just hang out with the others. You can try to report the killer(s) but there is no guarantee that the phones will be working.

Features:
  • Multiplayer: Play with your friends or other people.
  • Social Deduction: Anyone could be the killer and its up to you who you trust.
  • Sabotage: Electricity, Water and Telephone line can be sabotaged and fixed.
  • Immersive Experience: Realistic graphics, sounds and illumination will create a totally immersive experience.
  • Endless Replayability: Wide set of match configurations for random item spawns, unpredictable events and roleplay options, every playthrough brings a unique experience.
  • Weather System: Dynamic lightning storm produce random lightning strike events that could trip the fuse box or even kill anyone who dare to to stay outside for too long.

Current maps:

  • Salazar Manor
    • Size: Medium
    • Max players: 10
2158210.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
